creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Maybe wait until after things settle around pkg 2.0.3. 

Note to self: <https://matrix.to/#/!DYLObmCRRvLlOSHQkG:matrix-dev.freebsd.org/$b3Txw_TPz8tfUYei_ZNCdtV2f37LOP-CBMIK6yDp5rk?via=matrix-dev.freebsd.org&via=matrix.org&via=kde.org> my locks of qutebrowser and sigil, before creation of a boot environment, were in response to a prior test in a separate tab for which I didn't save the buffer.
